The dashboard binds to `127.0.0.1` (loopback only) — see `TcpListener::bind(("127.0.0.1", port))` in `src/dashboard.rs:182` (and again at line 267 for the workspace dashboard), by construction, per the module doc comment at `src/dashboard.rs:8-18`.

The dashboard binds to `127.0.0.1` only — `TcpListener::bind(("127.0.0.1", port))` in `src/dashboard.rs:182` (and again at `src/dashboard.rs:267` for the federated workspace dashboard).
